title: Pandemic Fall Fundraiser: You Did It!
summary: Thanks to each and every one of you who donated to KUAC during the Fall Fundraiser. A special thanks to the volunteers who recorded messages to liven up the atmosphere. And to the challenge donors who matched donations, boosting our funds even more. A great big hug to all of you from the KUAC Team!...
